function.name: get_trending_topics
function.long_description: Identifies trending news topics by analyzing frequently occurring keywords in recent news headlines fetched from an external news API.
example_user_queries: What topics are trending in the news right now?
Show me the current trending news topics.
List the top trending topics today.
What stories are getting the most attention in the news?
Give me the trending headlines people are following.
Show the latest popular news topics.
What are the hottest news trends at the moment?
Fetch the top trending subjects in the news.
Tell me which topics are currently trending.
Get the most discussed news topics right now.
